name_en: M30283 Crossgrain! (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized Custom Version! This small Louis Vuitton wallet is the ideal all-in-one wallet, capable of holding credit cards, cash, and documents. This wallet comes from Louis Vuitton's earliest men's series—the Taïga leather series.
name_cn:
M30283 Crossgrain! (〽️Grade A Full Steel〽️) Personalized Custom Version! This small Louis Vuitton wallet is the ideal all-in-one wallet, capable of holding credit cards, cash, and documents. This wallet comes from Louis Vuitton's earliest men's series—the Taïga leather series.
7.5 x 11 x 1 cm
(Length x Height x Width).
